base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ken_stage — a tile from 1991 street fighter ii. Ken's USA harbor pier — crowds of onlookers. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
